assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Phase 2 clearly shows control plane upgrade before Phase 3 node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Specifies order as Coordinators → Masters → Data nodes with rationale based on risk levels and criticality

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: While regional pd-ssd is mentioned in overview, the response doesn't explicitly explain how regional PVs provide safety during upgrades by reattaching across zones

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB configuration with minAvailable: 2 for master nodes to maintain quorum

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Uses blue-green upgrade strategy instead of specifying maxSurge/maxUnavailable settings for StatefulSet node pools

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes health checks and monitoring commands after each node pool upgrade phase

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain for data safety

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl get statefulsets' in post-upgrade validation section

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Phase 1.3 includes detailed commands for creating pre-upgrade Elasticsearch snapshots
